description_long: This is a large, rectangular factory building with a flat, slightly gabled roof featuring multiple long, narrow skylights for natural lighting. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with a prominent peach-colored band running along the upper front and rear facades. The front side displays a company sign labeled 'TORRES' above a large industrial entrance and a smaller personnel door, both set into a clean, utilitarian facade. Small shrubs and plants are arranged along the front, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise industrial appearance. The building sits on a flat, gray base, suggesting a concrete foundation, and the overall design is functional with minimal decorative elements. No smokestacks or rooftop machinery are visible, and the structure is typical of modern industrial architecture.
description: A large, light gray factory building with a peach accent band, multiple roof skylights, and a prominent industrial entrance with a company sign and landscaping at the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, plain gray wall with a peach band at one end and several skylights on the roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gabled roof with skylights and a single industrial door, with the peach band visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the peach band now on the right and the same arrangement of skylights.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, company sign, peach accent band, and landscaping with shrubs.
